summary: The file provides an update from the EU regulator about the new Anti-Money Laundering (AML) reporting thresholds, which is now set at €5,000. This change is effective immediately. It is crucial for the compliance team to update internal policies in accordance with this new regulation. Additionally, the finance department should be informed to revise customer verification procedures.
The client has requested a weekly performance report which is due by next Friday. The task has been assigned to Lisa.
The client has requested a weekly performance report, which is due by next Friday. The task has been assigned to Lisa.

The document pertains to a recent update from the European Union regulator concerning the adjustment of Anti-Money Laundering (AML) reporting thresholds. The revised limit is now €5,000 and this change is effective immediately. It is crucial for the compliance team to update internal policies in line with this modification. Additionally, the finance department should be informed to revise the customer verification procedures accordingly.
The client has requested a weekly performance report, which is due by next Friday. The task has been assigned to Lisa.

Additionally, the finance department should be informed to adjust customer verification procedures accordingly.

It is crucial for the compliance team to update our internal policies in accordance with this new regulation. Additionally, the finance department should be informed to revise the customer verification procedures accordingly.
